keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal! IR Iran 0, New Zealand 1. Elijah Just (New Zealand) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Chris Wood.
Delay in match because of an injury Shahriyar Moghanloo (IR Iran).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! IR Iran 1, New Zealand 1. Ramin Rezaeian (IR Iran) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner.
Delay in match because of an injury Shahriyar Moghanloo (IR Iran).
Delay in match because of an injury Marko Stamenic (New Zealand).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match because of an injury Saeid Ezatolahi (IR Iran).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
First Half ends, IR Iran 1, New Zealand 1.
Substitution, IR Iran. Mehdi Ghayedi replaces Arya Yousefi.
Substitution, IR Iran. Ali Alipour replaces Shahriyar Moghanloo.
Goal! IR Iran 1, New Zealand 2. Elijah Just (New Zealand) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Chris Wood following a fast break.
Goal! IR Iran 2, New Zealand 2. Mohammad Mohebbi (IR Iran) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Ramin Rezaeian with a cross.
Substitution, IR Iran. Ehsan Hajisafi replaces Saman Ghoddos.
Substitution, New Zealand. Ryan Thomas replaces Callum McCowatt.
Substitution, New Zealand. Ben Old replaces Liberato Cacace.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, New Zealand. Callan Elliot replaces Tim Payne.
Delay in match because of an injury Saeid Ezatolahi (IR Iran).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, IR Iran. Amirhossein Hosseinzadeh replaces Mehdi Taremi.
Ehsan Hajisafi (IR Iran) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, New Zealand. Jesse Randall replaces Sarpreet Singh.
Substitution, New Zealand. Tyler Bindon replaces Marko Stamenic.
